mapper.sql: vip_card_id AS vipCardId, card_name AS cardName, benefit_desc AS benefitDesc, price, validity_days AS validityDays, store_addr_ids AS storeAddrIds, fee_rule_id AS feeRuleId, show_buy_count AS showBuyCount, base_buy_count AS baseBuyCount, step_num AS stepNum, step_add_price AS stepAddPrice, price_cap AS priceCap, sold_count AS soldCount, status, created_date AS createdDate, bind_fit_card_ids AS bindFitCardIds, pause_rule_id AS pauseRuleId
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM vip_benefit_card
status = 1
AND card_name LIKE concat('%', #{cardName}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{storeAddrId}, store_addr_ids)
ORDER BY created_date DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit_card
status = 1
AND card_name LIKE concat('%', #{cardName}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{storeAddrId}, store_addr_ids)
SELECT FROM vip_benefit_card WHERE vip_card_id = #{vipCardId} AND status = 1
